name: global-auth
description: Global Auth plugins for Codex. Skills: global-auth:frontend for TxGlobalAuth widget integration and global-auth:backend for JWT validation and session data extraction.

interface.shortDescription: TxGlobalAuth frontend and backend integration help.
interface.longDescription: Codex skills for integrating TxGlobalAuth in frontend applications and backend services, including widget initialization, authentication flows, token management, JWT validation, session data extraction, and common integration pitfalls.
defaultPrompt: Add TxGlobalAuth login to this app.
